feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Learning to Predict Clouds: A Neural Network Model for Predicting Exoplanetary Cloud Formation
entry.content:
Authors: A Reza, Z Zalenska, L Carone, C Helling

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... habitability (ie, biosignature ) of exoplanets. It is pivotal in determining which gas species may be observable in exoplanet spectra. The ... We apply this ML framework on a GCM grid comprising 60 inflated hot Jupiters orbiting A, F, G, K, and ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets
